title: rubus × flexuosiformis
intro: Rubus × flexuosiformis, also known as the hybrid black raspberry, is a plant species derived from the cross between Rubus idaeus and Rubus occidentalis. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its high content of anthocyanins and ellagic acid, which have been shown to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Rubus × flexuosiformis include its potential to protect against cell damage, reduce inflammation, and support cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
